Empty approver lists could grant explicit approval authorization.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.12`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.12`

## Impact

For helper-backed channels, an empty resolved approver list could be interpreted as explicit approval authorization, allowing a sender outside the normal channel authorization gate to resolve pending approvals if they knew an approval id.

## Technical Details

The fix prevents empty approver lists from granting explicit approval authorization and adds regression coverage for unauthorized senders.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #65714. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.12`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `0a105c0900de701d2ee9f1abc96b017afbd0afdd`
- PR: #65714

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.12 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @anshumanbh for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00244, "percentile": 0.1551}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-49cg-279w-m73x", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T21:55:54Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-49cg-279w-m73x", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-49cg-279w-m73x"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43574"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-05T12:16:21Z", "published_at": "2026-04-17T21:55:54Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-49cg-279w-m73x", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/65714", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/0a105c0900de701d2ee9f1abc96b017afbd0afdd", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43574", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-improper-authorization-via-empty-approver-lists", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-49cg-279w-m73x"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-49cg-279w-m73x", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Empty approver lists could grant explicit approval authorization", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T01:32:41Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-49cg-279w-m73x", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.12", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.12"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Empty approver lists could grant explicit approval authorization
